name: 視力恢復＋重新求婚
description: Tristan視力恢復後正式向Ashley求婚，將「假婚姻」升級為「真選擇」，完成從契約到真愛的閉環，觀眾獲得圓滿的情感滿足。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Today, I'd like to formally propose to you, Miss Ashley Green. Will you marry me again? The real me says yes.
